events.agenda: 4:00-4:25 Check in; 4:25-4:30 Welcome Remarks; 4:30-5:10 Presentation with Kyle Marshall (Shopify); 5:00-5:45 Open Forum; 5:45-6:00 Closing Remarks.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as data governance, analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.
events.event_name: Mastering Data Governance with dbt: Join Phoenix User Group Meetup
events.location: Slalom Consulting, 7150 E Camelback Rd #200, Scottsdale, AZ
events.raw_text: Thu, Sep 19, 2024 · 4:00 PM to 5:30 PM MST. Presentation with Kyle Marshall, Senior Staff Data Engineer @ Shopify, on mastering data governance with dbt.

talks.description: Kyle Marshall shares his approach to mastering data governance using dbt at Shopify's scale.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 4:30 - 5:10 | Presentations with Kyle Marshall (Senior Staff Data Engineer @ Shopify)
talks.title: Mastering Data Governance with dbt
